channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech

item.title: Amazon workers are striking at multiple delivery hubs. Here's what you should know
item.description: Amazon workers affiliated with the Teamsters union are holding a strike at seven of the company’s delivery hubs less than a week before Christmas.
item.dc:creator: Haleluya Hadero, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Massive data breach at federal credit union exposes 240,000 members
item.description: A credit union with over 240,000 members recently revealed it was targeted by cybercriminals, resulting in a data breach that was part of a two-month attack by hackers.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Thousands of GPS tracking customers have info leaked following data breach
item.description: A bug in Hapn's website is allegedly spilling sensitive information, while the company remains silent.
item.dc:creator: TechRadar

item.title: GitHub is making its AI programming Copilot free for VS Code developers
item.description: Free version of GitHub Copilot is now available to all developers in VS Code, but there are some restrictions.
item.dc:creator: TechRadar

item.title: Smart policing revolution: How Kazakhstan is setting a global benchmark
item.description: In the era of digital transformation, public safety stands at a critical crossroads. Law enforcement agencies globally are under increasing scrutiny to enhance transparency, efficiency, and trust within their communities.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: Enterprise-grade caching with Azure Managed Redis
item.description: Microsoft has made a lot of big bets in its preferred cloud-native infrastructure. You only need to look at .
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: Create searchable Bluesky bookmarks with R
item.description: The Bluesky social network is seeping into the mainstream, thanks in part to people unhappy with changes at X (formerly Twitter). “It’s not some untouched paradise, but it’s got a spark of something refreshing,” Jan Beger, global head of AI Advocacy at GE HealthCare, posted on LinkedIn last month.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: Data on animal movements help Hungarian researchers create a swarm of autonomous drones
item.description: BUDAPEST, Hungary (AP) — Moving in a dense cloud, like throngs of people walking across a crowded public square, 100 drones maneuver through the night sky in Hungary's capital, the result of over a decade of research and experimentation that scientists believe could change the future of unmanned fli
item.dc:creator: JUSTIN SPIKE, Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Snapchat is overhauling how influencers earn money on the platform
item.description: “I’m sorry WHO is using snapchat in the big year of 2024,” one X user asked. Turns out, a lot of people and for some, it’s proving lucrative. Influencer Julieanna Goddard, better known as YesJulz, recently posted her impressive Snapchat earnings to social media in response to the question.
item.dc:creator: Eve Upton-Clark, Fast Company

item.title: McConnell urges Supreme Court to reject TikTok's bid to delay ban
item.description: Senate Minority Leader Mitch McConnell (R-Ky.) filed an amicus brief with the Supreme Court on Wednesday, urging it to reject TikTok’s request to delay a law that could ban the app next month.
item.dc:creator: Julia Shapero, The Hill

item.title: Elon Musk: Anyone who votes for spending deal should lose reelection
item.description: Tech mogul Elon Musk continued his tirade against the newly unveiled end-of-year funding deal Wednesday, calling for any lawmaker who supports the continuing resolution to be voted out of office.
item.dc:creator: Julia Shapero, The Hill

item.title: Homeland Security gets its very own generative AI chatbot
item.description: In today's Federal Newscast, Homeland Security has rolled out its own generative AI chatbot, now available to roughly 19,000 employees. The post Homeland Security gets its very own generative AI chatbot first appeared on Federal News Network.
item.dc:creator: Eric White, Federal News Network

item.title: That text from the US Postal Service could be a scam. How to avoid ‘smishing’ fraud
item.description: Be careful in the final week before Christmas, because scammers are trying to use text messages to take advantage of you.
item.dc:creator: Tribune News Service, The Mercury News

item.title: How AI can help with your last-minute holiday shopping
item.description: If you’re still working on your holiday shopping—or looking for a treat for yourself—you might consider using artificial intelligence tools to help you find the perfect purchase.
item.dc:creator: Steven Melendez, Fast Company

item.title: How to work with text colors on Linux
item.description: When you list files on the Linux command line, many of the file names show up in colors, as you’ve probably noticed. The colors used depend on the file types. For example, the names of directories will show up in a blue font.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: Supreme Court takes up challenge to TikTok ban
item.description: The Supreme Court announced it will take up whether a law that could ban TikTok nationwide violates the First Amendment, setting the stage for a fast-paced, high-stakes battle over free speech.
item.dc:creator: Julia Shapero, NewsNation

item.title: Musk and Trump are viewed roughly the same by Americans, an AP-NORC poll finds
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — Elon Musk, clad in tuxedo and black tie, took the stage at President-elect Donald Trump's Mar-a-Lago resort shortly after the election with all the swagger of the winning candidate himself. “The public has given us a mandate that could not be more clear, the clearest mandate.
item.dc:creator: THOMAS BEAUMONT, SARAH PARVINI and AMELIA THOMSON-DEVEAUX, Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: CompTIA launches expert-level cybersecurity certification
item.description: CompTIA this week made available its CompTIA SecurityX certification program, which is an updated version of the CompTIA Advanced Security Practitioner (CASP+) cert and part of CompTIA’s Xpert Series of certifications.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: Barcelona subway recycles energy from braking into power to charge electric cars
item.description: BARCELONA, Spain (AP) — The Barcelona subway grinds to a halt, the doors slide open and commuters pour out to go about their daily business. Little do they know that as they do so, a burst of energy is sent up to street level to help charge an electric car.
item.dc:creator: JOSEPH WILSON, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Half a million patients' personal info stolen in massive health care data breach
item.description: Hackers recently leaked personal information of about 500,000 Americans and stole patient medical records that included lab results and insurance details.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: IT/OT convergence propels zero-trust security efforts
item.description: Zero-trust security is essential to enterprises that are converging operational technology (OT) with IT infrastructure. New research from Enterprise Management Associates (EMA) identified how this convergence influences zero-trust strategy and implementation.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: 5 wizardly ways to integrate web apps with Windows
item.description: While Windows is a powerful operating system for productivity, so much of what we do with work these days revolves around the web.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: Smart cities in action: Kazakhstan’s Carpet CCTV project sets a new standard
item.description: In a world where technology increasingly shapes how cities manage safety and security, Kazakhstan’s Ministry of Internal Affairs is leading the way with its groundbreaking “Carpet CCTV” project.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: The push to upskill the technology workforce in federal agencies
item.description: The federal government is facing a massive tech talent shortage, particularly as the development and use of AI continues to gain traction. The post The push to upskill the technology workforce in federal agencies first appeared on Federal News Network.
item.dc:creator: commentators, Federal News Network

item.title: DHS Science and Technology Directorate looks to the evolution of first responder communications
item.description: New realities of emergency work for emergency responders has necessitated increased use of data transmission of live incident video and file sharing. The post DHS Science and Technology Directorate looks to the evolution of first responder communications first appeared on Federal News Network.
item.dc:creator: Michele Sandiford, Federal News Network

item.title: Blood in the iPhones? Apple faces criminal charges
item.description: Apple has been accused of knowingly financing a trade characterized by atrocities in criminal litigation launched by the Democratic Republic of Congo (DRC). It relates to use of so-called “blood minerals” in its devices.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: Equinix to end its bare-metal service
item.description: Hosting and colocation giant Equinix is sunsetting its bare-metal infrastructure-as-a-service (IaaS) offering by June 2026. New features will no longer be added to Equinix Metal, as the service was called.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: Steps to protect yourself while shopping on your phone this holiday season
item.description: The holiday season sees a rise in mobile shopping scams. Tech expert Kurt “CyberGuy" Knutsson helps you learn how to stay safe.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Elon Musk wants to turn SpaceX's Starbase site into a Texas city
item.description: Billionaire Elon Musk 's company on Thursday sent a letter to local officials requesting an election to turn what it calls Starbase — the South Texas site where SpaceX builds and launches its massive Starship rockets — into an incorporated city.
item.dc:creator: VALERIE GONZALEZ, Associated Press, NewsNation
